title: Berger Paints is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Berger Paints is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Berger Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Berger Paints:
Berger Paints is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Paints!
